_description: Manifest of every audio file the project ships. Consumed by scripts/generate-audio.py to regenerate audio via the ElevenLabs API. Adding a new entry + running the script is the canonical way to add a new audio file.

files.text: short modern UI rejection beep, two-tone descending pitch, sharp and clear, 1 second
soft modern UI navigation chime, single ascending whoosh tone, gentle and brief, 1 second
subtle modern UI file save tap, soft click followed by quick chime, 1 second
modern UI task creation notification, two-tone ascending bell-like chime, friendly and bright, 1 second

_legacy_files_note: The 22 pre-v5.0 audio files (notification-urgent.mp3, task-complete.mp3, etc.) were generated before this manifest existed and are NOT regenerated by default. To rebuild any of them, add an entry here matching the filename and run `python scripts/generate-audio.py --only <filename>`.
